questions.statement: <!-- x-tinymce/html -->If u, g, and h are the initial velocity, gravitational acceleration, and height, respectively, of an object falling under gravitational force, then its final velocity v can be obtained from:

<span style="color: rgb(33, 37, 41);">v<sup>2</sup>/</span><span style="color: rgb(33, 37, 41);">u</span><span style="position: relative;  line-height: 0; vertical-align: baseline; top: -0.5em;font-size:10.5px;">2</span><span style="color: rgb(33, 37, 41);">&nbsp;= 2gh</span> /
